name: Microwave Pumpkin Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart microwave-safe bowl, melt 1/3 cup margarine on HIGH for 30-45 seconds or until melted. Stir in brown sugar and sugar. Lightly spoon flour into a measuring cup; level off. Mix flour with pumpkin pie spice and salt until crumbly. Remove 1/2 cup mixture to a small bowl. Add nuts and cinnamon. Mix well; set aside.
2. To the remaining mixture, add baking powder, baking soda, sour cream, pumpkin, and egg. Beat until smooth. Pour batter into an ungreased 8 or 9-inch round microwave-safe dish. Sprinkle with the reserved mixture.
3. Microwave on MEDIUM for 8 minutes, rotating the dish 1/4 turn halfway through baking. Then, set the microwave to HIGH and cook for 3-1/2 to 5-1/2 minutes, rotating the dish once halfway through baking until the cake pulls away from the sides of the dish.
4. Let stand on a flat surface for 5 minutes. In a small bowl, combine powdered sugar, 1 teaspoon margarine, and enough milk for desired drizzling consistency. Drizzle glaze over the coffee cake. Serve warm or cold.
